title: HeyJoshiii Community Modpack
description: This Modpack with many allowed Mods for the Community Server from the geman Twitch Streamer HeyJoshiii.
body:
# 🎮 HeyJoshiii’s Community Modpack

A lightweight, community modpack made for the HeyJoshiii Twitch Community Server!

## 🧱 Vanilla experience, enhanced:
This pack adds small, quality-of-life improvements without changing core gameplay – perfect for players who love the feel of vanilla Minecraft but want a smoother, more connected multiplayer experience.

## ✅ Features:
- Minimal & clean QoL mods (minimap, inventory tweaks, chat tools)
- Built for community play: simple, stable, and cooperative
- Lightweight & performance-friendly – runs like vanilla!

Regular updates based on community server updates

**📦 Easy to install via Modrinth.**

**🎥 Join us live at: [https://www.twitch.tv/heyjoshiii](https://www.twitch.tv/heyjoshiii)**

**💬 Community info & server IP available in our Discord!**


<details>
